public_reputation: Roazian medical authority balancing survival medicine with security obligations in a hard labor environment.
appearance: Warden-Surgeon Cala Venn usually presents in layered civic fabric cut to show rank without inviting touch, with details that make their warden-surgeon status legible before introductions begin.
manner: Carries the habits of a warden-surgeon whose work is visible through daily procedure, gatekeeping, and the practical pressures of Ironhold Quarry.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of warden-surgeon in and around Ironhold Quarry, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Ironhold Quarry workable through the obligations of warden-surgeon while managing immediate local pressure without public breakdown.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of warden-surgeon credible while absorbing strain, delay, scarcity, access pressure, or political friction tied to Ironhold Quarry.

Warden-Surgeon Cala Venn becomes useful when the party needs access, explanation, or relief tied to the work of a warden-surgeon.

support_scope_notes: Created from the estate and daily-life infrastructure execution patch to make polity-native estate operations usable at table scale. V33_1 additive depth pass preserved canon while strengthening at-table identity, appearance, and social motive.
public_signal: In public, Warden-Surgeon Cala Venn is readable as a warden-surgeon tied to Ironhold Quarry.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Ironhold Quarry: role-relevant halls, counters, corridors, docks, archives, shrines, workshops, gates, or administrative rooms

first_impression: Warden-Surgeon Cala Venn presents as someone shaped by the duties of a warden-surgeon and the daily pressures of Ironhold Quarry.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a warden-surgeon, and proof that strangers will not make Ironhold Quarry harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Warden-Surgeon Cala Venn refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a warden-surgeon too rigidly, protecting reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Warden-Surgeon Cala Venn can open local doors, explain expectations, and redirect pressure before it hardens.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Warden-Surgeon Cala Venn adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Warden-Surgeon Cala Venn always knows more about Ironhold Quarry than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to warden-surgeon duties in Ironhold Quarry.
